/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic CMakeFiles/consumer.dir/calluserservice.cc.o CMakeFiles/consumer.dir/__/user.pb.cc.o -o /media/user/15D152C02DCFEA2B/yxh/CppProject/MPRPC/bin/consumer   -L/media/user/15D152C02DCFEA2B/yxh/CppProject/MPRPC/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/media/user/15D152C02DCFEA2B/yxh/CppProject/MPRPC/lib /media/user/15D152C02DCFEA2B/yxh/CppProject/MPRPC/lib/libmprpc.a -lprotobuf -lmuduo_net -lmuduo_base -lpthread -lzookeeper_mt
